name: Breath of the Seraphs
description: A Seraph relic designed around post-revive momentum. After you get a Second Wind, it grants a short burst of bonus damage and rapid health regeneration, letting you stabilise quickly and press the advantage instead of scrambling just to stay alive.

special.description: After a Second Wind, it grants a short buff that boosts damage and rapidly regenerates health for roughly 15 seconds.
special.title: Their return is to be feared...
